arts.ttl: I was really hard with Tom Cannon and I was surprised with how well he handled it
arts.sum: If you want to be a top team your keeper and your striker need to be the best players. But he has not always had it his own way, having needed time to get match sharp considering he hadn’t started a game for Leicester for several months before joining on loan and being withdrawn at half-time of games at Middlesbrough and Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: 'I am young but not silly' - Every word from Narcis Pelach's pre-Millwall press conference - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: I think at home our fans can be a difference and it’s why we have to give our all and make sure that all the fans are next to us and proud and make difficult things for Millwall, because they’re a good side and we need that help. Narcis Pelach took time out of his preparations on the training ground to preview Stoke City’s home match against Millwall (Saturday, 12.30pm) as they try to make it three wins on the bounce going into the international break.

arts.ttl: Stoke boss: ‘Blackburn win means nothing if we fail to replicate that against Millwall’
arts.sum: Stoke City boss Narcis Pelach wants his side to back up their 2-0 midweek win over Blackburn Rovers with a similar performance against Millwall on Saturday. “We need to make sure we’re there on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Millwall midfielder would like to extend Den stay but is ‘pretty relaxed’ over contract situation
arts.sum: “That is probably as much as I’ve thought about it because I probably feel if I help the team win, keep trying to perform – whether it is Millwall or somewhere else – that something will happen for me. “Ultimately if I play well and help the team win then it is good for both parties for whatever comes down the line.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss Harris on his side having best points total since he was brought back to Den outfit in February
arts.sum: Asked how much pride he had in that statistic, Millwall head coach Harris said: “Huge. Millwall have taken more points than any other Championship club since Neil Harris returned to The Den on February 21 – but the head coach is not stopping to admire that achievement.

arts.ttl: Talking points from Millwall’s 1-0 win over Leeds - clean sheet kings as Neil Harris makes phenomenal impact since replacing Joe Edwards
arts.sum: The one moment of quality for the Lions in the first half came from Romain Esse’s dance towards the box in the 20th minute from the right-hand side, gliding past Leeds shirts to fire a shot at Illan Meslier’s goal. With three matches within the space of a week – including back-to-back home fixtures against automatic promotion-chasing duo Burnley and Leeds – Millwall head coach Neil Harris was forced to rotate his side for Wednesday night’s clash.
